nasb.text: So he will turn his face toward the fortresses of his own land, but he will stumble and fall and be found no more.

esv.text: Then he shall turn his face back toward the fortresses of his own land, but he shall stumble and fall, and shall not be found.

cnv.text: 於是他轉向自己國中的堡壘，終於絆跌仆倒，不再存在了。

ccb.text: 他将返回本国的堡垒，从此一蹶不振，销声匿迹。
